name: Crypto Monitoring
summary: Discover token price and crypto market data capabilities for monitoring workflows.
description: A copy-paste recipe for finding cryptocurrency price and market data capabilities, calling a selected provider, and checking final usage records.

qveris.reason: Find cryptocurrency market data capabilities by natural-language intent.
Read required token, currency, billing, and quality metadata before execution.
Execute the selected crypto market data capability with token parameters.
Verify usage and ledger records after execution.

network.reason: Call QVeris API endpoints for discovery, execution, and audit.

marketplace.headline: Crypto market data discovery for token monitoring.
marketplace.audience: Agents and developers that need token price or crypto market data APIs.

examples.name: CLI first call
examples.command: qveris init --query "cryptocurrency market price and volume API" --params '{"symbol":"BTC","currency":"USD"}' --json
